sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92132" key="r(ako/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾰκόεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n92132.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ragged, torn, tattered,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n92132.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> (<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥάκος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrinkled</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρώς</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.66</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
